thag3.8:1.3: his body lean & lined with veins,
thag3.8:2.1:
in food & drink:
the man of undaunted heart.
thag3.8:2.4: the great wood, like an elephant
thag3.8:3.1:
at the head of a battle:
He, mindful,
thag3.8:3.3:
endure.
One alone is like Brahmā,
thag3.8:3.5:
three, like a village, more than that:
a hullabaloo.
